name: Shikadai Nara
description: A chuunin of Konohagakure, and the heir to the Nara clan. As a member of Team 10 with his team-mates [Chouchou Akimichi](https://anilist.co/character/121443/Chouchou-Akimichi) and [Inojin Yamanaka,](https://anilist.co/character/121441/Inojin-Yamanaka) he forms the seventeenth generation of the Ino–Shika–Chou trio. Shikadai is the only child of [Shikamaru](https://anilist.co/character/2007/Shikamaru-Nara) and [Temari Nara.](https://anilist.co/character/2174/Temari) Shortly after his birth, Shikam

name: Yui
description: __Race:__ Human __Occupation:__ House Wife __Affiliations:__ Iwagakure Yui is the daughter of the Iwagakure chief and the wife of Gabimaru. Yui is very kind, caring and gentle. She truly loves Gabimaru and believes that he is not completely emotionless as people make him out to be. She accepts the fact that he kills people and is not terrified being around him. Yui is also shown to be wise as she gave Gabimaru words of wisdom on why he should relax his body while giving him a bath. She is very c

name: Aoba Tsukishima
description: The third daughter of the Tsukishima family, one year younger than Kou and Wakaba. Aoba is jealous of how much time Wakaba spends with Kou, and frequently tells Kou how much she hates him. She is an excellent pitcher, Kou modeling after her. She has a poster of Ryota Igarashi, a famous fastball pitcher, hanging on her bedroom wall, and says she is only interested in a guy who can pitch a fastball at 160 km/h (about 100 mph). She loves to pitch in practice games, even though as a girl she cannot

name: Ginga Hagane
description: Ginga appears to be generally laid back (he is often seen sleeping and he generally does whatever he feels like doing) unless something happens to his friends or his beyblade or he has to fight in a beybattle. He would surely do anything to save his blade if it were to be somehow damaged. What is certain though is that this Japanese boy is not afraid to fight 100 beyblades! But he believes in his friend's (Pegasus') power, so he is victorious.

name: Hans Humpty
description: A strange man who mimics a cat as he talks. He fences with an unworldly and peculiar skill.
mediaTitles: Rokka: Braves of the Six Flowers
Rokka: Braves of the Six Flowers

name: Ichirouta Kazemaru
description: Originally a member of the track club team, Kazemaru is convinced by Endo of becoming a player of the soccer team, because the team needed 4 more players for their match against Teikoku; if Endo couldn't get them the soccer club would be closed. Kazemaru is finally convinced by the promise of fighting a lot of stronger players, altogether with Endo fighting spirit.
mediaTitles: Inazuma Eleven: The Seal of Orion
searchTerms: Inazuma Eleven: The Seal of Orion

name: Junko Saotome
description: Nana's sensible, no-nonsense best friend. Junko is much more emotionally mature than Nana and often pushes her to be more independent and responsible. She's the host of the omake (bonus) section at the end of each manga volume, reading fan mail and displaying fan art. She's often called "Jun" by Nana K.

name: Popp
description: As the son of the weapons merchant Junk, 15 year old Popp left his home in Rankaksu and decided to become an apprentice of Avan, training to become a magician. He is a specialist on fire spells, mainly those of the Mera (fire) type (Mera, Merami, and Merazoma), but as the story progresses, he learns more powerful spells such as Betan (a gravity pressure attack) and Medoroa (one of the most powerful spells). mediaTitles: Dragon Quest: The Adventure of Dai

name: Quiche
description: He is the first of the alien antagonists who come to Earth, wishing to "reclaim it." His people were originally from Earth, and were forced to flee their planet. He hates humans for turning Earth into a trash heap so he, Tart, and Pie use Chimera animals to destroy the human race. He is a carefree, playful, clever, optimistic, and a rather open-minded person, although this is somewhat hidden by his blood-lustful intentions for humans. He enjoys torturing Ichigo Momomiya, his main enemy, whom he

name: Semyon Brezhnev
nativeName: サーミャ・ブレジネフ
description: A tall Black Russian who came to the city to help out his Russian friend who runs a sushi shop. His real name is Semyon but everyone just calls him by the name, "Simon". Even though he is a friendly person, it has been shown that he is a force to be reckoned with as he is able to stop a fight with a man his size with just a single arm and also able to fight on par with Shizuo, who is one of the most feared men in Ikebukuro. He is another member of Dollars.
searchTerms: サーミャ・ブレジネフ

name: Shoot McMahon
description: Shoot McMahon (シュート＝マクマホン, Shūto Makumahon?) is an Unidentified Beast Hunter, Knuckle's partner, and the second disciple of Morel. He has a timid personality and is often afraid of taking advantage of opportune times to attack his enemy. When the fight begins with Youpi, he becomes inspired by Gon and is able to fully unleash his power, overcoming his timidness and injuries.

name: Tetta Kisaki
description: Kisaki is the principal antagonist of Tokyo Revengers. He's especially known for rising to the top of the Toman at full speed. Kisaki is a ruthless, cunning, and ambitious individual who will stop at nothing to achieve his goals. Although average in stature, his power to rule with fear makes even those stronger than he obey him. name: Vanica Zogratis
nativeName: ヴァニカ・ゾグラティス
description: Member of the Spade Kingdom's Dark Triad, and the host for the devil Megicula. She's a psychopath and she enjoys fightings against tough enemies. Her native magic is Blood Magic, whilst Megicula's magic is Curse Warding Magic.

name: Yslat Han
description: He was a master of the game 'Pick Me Up' who went by the nickname of Loki and was ranked 5th in it. One day, he gets brought into the world of Taoneer as Han Yslat, a 1-star playable character.

name: Akihiko Kayaba
description: Director and creator of the Nerve Gear and *Sword Art Online*. He traps all the players within *Sword Art Online* by using the Nerve Gear to cease sending signals to the users' body. Any attempt of removal, loss of power for a certain period, or if the user dies in the game will also kill the user. His motivation is to observe what happens after he traps them. ~!He is in fact Heathcliff in the game *SAO*, who is the leader of the guild Knights of Blood.!~
mediaTitles: Sword Art Online: Alicization - War of Underworld
searchTerms: Sword Art Online: Alicization - War of Underworld

name: Ayaka Sunohara
description: Ayaka Sunohara is the main female protagonist of Sunohara-Sō no Kanrinin-san. She is the owner of the Sunohara Inn who is always taking care almost everyone in the inn and the older sister of Nana Sunohara. She is a gentle, benevolent and compassionate person in the Sunohara Inn.

name: Bright Noa
description: Bright is the leader of the White base crew during the One Year War. He had several opinions of the war, but rarely expressed them due to his lower rank. He often looks after Amuro and helps him make the right decision. ~!After the One Year War, he marries [Mirai Yashima](https://anilist.co/character/1352/Mirai-Yashima) and has two children, [Hathaway](https://anilist.co/character/40465/Hathaway-Noa) and [Cheimin](https://anilist.co/character/165067).!~ ~!He later went on to command the AEUG car

name: Iko Kirino
description: Iko is a member of Fuurin high school's broadcasting club. She dreams of becoming a Vtuber.

name: Kanon Matsubara
description: __Height:__ 156 cm (5'1") Kanon is a second-year student and was the first to be roped in by Kokoro to become a member of Hello, Happy World!. Kanon is very clumsy, quick to burst into tears, and has a bad sense of direction. Outside of the band, she is good friends with Chisato, whom she has known ever since middle school. name: Pawoo Nekoyanagi
description: Milo Nekoyangi's older sister who is stricken with the Rust disease. She is Captain of the Imihama Watch which defends society from "mushroom terrorists".

name: Ranze Kurona
description: __Height:__ 168 cm (5'6") __Team:__ Bastard München (NEL) __Position:__ Wingback, Forward Ranze Kurona is a participant of the Blue Lock project and plays for Bastard München during the Neo Egoist League. He typically plays as a post-player who can be easily utilized to exchange possession in the instance [Isagi](https://anilist.co/character/140856/Yoichi-Isagi) gets pressured.

name: Ryuunosuke Mogumo
description: **Height:** 158 cm (5'2") A non-binary teenager who is invited by their classmate Tetsu to work at his family's maid café. Their greatest wish is to find friends who will understand them. They have an interest in video games, and have a particular fashion sense attuned to not entirely feminine or masculine. A bit shy at first, but when opened up, are quite more confident and stand up for themselves more.
mediaTitles: Love Me for Who I Am
searchTerms: Love Me for Who I Am

name: Shion Karanomori
description: __Height:__ 168 cm (5'6") An analyst in the Public Safety Bureau's General Analysis Division and a latent criminal as well. She provides backup to the Enforcers and Inspectors in their investigation by analyzing the data and evidence sent by them. She is in a relationship with Yayoi Kunizuka who is one of the enforcers of Unit 1. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Takashi Mitsuhashi
description: Height: 181 cm He gave up his ordinary school life and decided to "become a delinquent from today on" (thus the title of this manga), after moving to his new home in Chiba. To make his appearance more noticeable, he dyed his hair blond (he often use this appearance to pretend to be a foreigner). Being a very athletic person, he used his talent for the sole purpose of brawling and actually becomes a real delinquent.
